results.title: M4 Mounting hole dimensions - PCB COPY
results.snippet: The basic profile of M4 threads is defined by ISO 68-1 and ISO 261 standards. An M4 screw has an outer diameter of 4.0 mm and a thread pitch of 0.7 mm between crests. results.title: L-Bracket - Steel Design Solutions
results.snippet: What is an L-Bracket? An L-bracket, also known as an angle bracket or corner brace, is a simple metal bracket shaped like the letter "L." results.title: Long L Brackets - Durable Stainless Steel Solutions
results.snippet: The physical dimensions of the L bracket must align with your project's spatial constraints and the size of the components being joined: Long L brackets typically range from 3 inches to over 12 inches in leg length.
